channel.title: MPPSC on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in MPPSC on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: MPPSC Scientific Officer PCB Vacancy 2026
item.description: MPPSC Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 has been released for a total of 81 posts in Chemistry, Biology, and Physics under the Home Department of Madhya Pradesh. Candidates having Post Graduation (M.Sc) in relevant subjects are eligible to apply. The online application process will start from 21/04/2026 and the last date to apply is 20/05/2026. The selection will be based on a written examination followed by an interview.

item.title: MPPSC Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer Vacancy 2026
item.description: MPPSC ADPO Recruitment 2026 has been officially released for 17 posts of Assistant District Public Prosecution Officer (ADPO). The online application process will start from 09/04/2026 and the last date to apply is 08/05/2026. Candidates having an LLB degree can apply for this recruitment. The selection process includes a written exam and interview, and the exam is scheduled for 18/10/2026. The application fee is ₹250 for MP reserved category candidates and ₹500 for others. Interested candidates should apply online through the official website before the last date.

item.title: MPPSC Veterinary Assistant Surgeon Vacancy 2026
item.description: MPPSC has released the official notification for Veterinary Assistant Surgeon / VEO Recruitment 2026 for a total of 80 vacancies. Interested candidates can apply online from 02/04/2026 to 01/05/2026 through the official website. Candidates must have the required veterinary qualification and meet the age criteria. The selection process includes a written examination (OMR based) followed by further procedures. Applicants are advised to check eligibility, important dates, application fees, and official notification before applying.
